prompt: Build a Stream Deck Plus tool with buttons for different window layouts I use throughout my day. Button 1 is 'Focus mode' — closes Slack, moves Chrome to fill the left half of my screen, moves iTerm to the right half. Button 2 is 'Meeting mode' — opens Zoom, moves it to center screen at 1200x800, moves my notes app (Obsidian) to the left third. Button 3 is 'Communication' — opens Slack, opens Chrome to slack.com, tiles them side by side. Each button should show the layout name and a relevant icon. Use AppleScript via osascript to move and resize windows.
assertions: package.json includes sharp as a dependency
Three distinct buttons are defined for Focus, Meeting, and Communication layouts
osascript or execSync is used to run AppleScript
AppleScript 'set bounds' or equivalent is used to position/resize windows
Apps are activated or opened if not already running
Each button has a distinct label and icon identifying the layout
No external npm packages beyond @elgato-stream-deck/node and sharp are required
